title: otherDocumentationEvidencePayload
description: Other Documentation Evidence payload JSON schema

otherDocumentation.description: A set of other documentation evidences grouped by the client

testEvidence.description: List of objects containing a TE list and any overwritten properties from the defaults

results.description: A results object capturing the outcome of the test

summary.description: Summary of the results, why does the result mean the requirement is met

digest.description: The committment to the files at the fileLocation using the integrityMechanism

fileLocation.description: Location of the files associated with the TE relative to the base of the evidence catalog

integrityMechanism.description: The algorithm used to commit the evidence catalog contents to the reported results
